## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on GrowthX's engagement with Augment Code for AI-driven growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement on 8-week strategy sprint with mutual opt-out clause, aiming for rapid value delivery](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Augment Code's market position and differentiators are rapidly evolving (e.g., context engine, remote agent)](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX to start Monday, focusing on quick wins while building foundational elements](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need for agility and adaptability due to fast-paced AI market changes](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Timeline and Expectations

  - [Sylvain expressed concern about 8-week timeline being too long in fast-moving AI space](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Agreed on 8-week strategy sprint as a "probation period" with mutual opt-out clause](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver value quickly, starting work within 2 weeks of onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Week 4 set as checkpoint for progress evaluation and potential adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### Augment Code's Market Position

  - [Currently seen as "AI coding for developers," differentiating from no-code/low-code solutions](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Key differentiators: code quality, code retrieval, context engine ("best context")](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Recent launch of remote agent feature, though competitors quickly catching up](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Market landscape changing rapidly, requiring constant adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### Content and Growth Strategy

  - [Simplifying website to focus on core value propositions and increase sign-up rate](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Moving educational content post-signup into the product](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Need for balance between foundational work and agility to pivot based on market changes](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Potential focus areas: SEO content, remote agent implications, future of engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Technical and Data Access

  - [Augment Code migrating to Sanity CMS and Next.js, launching Friday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [GrowthX to get access to Google Analytics; direct data access may require workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [GrowthX's custom workflows can process raw data for quick insights](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Security and Compliance

  - [Augment Code requires basic security documentation from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide security questionnaire responses (similar to those for Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Clarification: GrowthX won't retain/process confidential data or train models on proprietary info](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send updated Statement of Work (SOW) for Augment Code's review](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Sylvain to initiate security compliance process with Augment Code's team](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Aim for contract signature within next few days to start engagement on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [GrowthX to allocate AI engineer resources for immediate availability](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Schedule Week 4 deep-dive sync to evaluate progress and adjust strategy if needed](https://fathom.video/share/dYh9FFBzxPhyb-cx8PQfNRLZP-f5k41X?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
